name: ktc_live
description: KTC dynasty rankings scrape output (legion + diego dashboards). Every bound below is evidence-based from live data inspected 2026-07-21; provenance in notes.

field_checks.note: KTC caps SF value at 9999; the top player sat at exactly 9999 on 2026-05-30, 2026-07-14, and 2026-07-21 while the identity churned (Bijan Robinson -> Jahmyr Gibbs) — hence an aggregate-max check, not a named record. min 6000 catches a value-scale collapse; max 9999 catches a scale change.

notes: record count: player_count == 500 EXACTLY in every commit of both dashboard repos (2026-07-12 -> 2026-07-21, incl. fresh origin/main data scraped 2026-07-21T03:48Z) — KTC's embedded playersArray carries the top 500, not the full ~1284 ranking. min_count 450 tolerates minor churn; max_count 600 catches a parse-format change. Supersedes the ~1284/1100 planning premise, corrected against live evidence 2026-07-21.
the scraper's own floor (abort below 100 players) is deliberately weaker than min_count — the contract is the product gate, the scraper floor is only a crash guard.
source of truth: ~/Projects/tools/contracts/ktc_live.json — the dashboard repos carry vendored copies (data-retrieval-loop Phase 2).
